title: UCB Acquires Candid Therapeutics for $2.2B
headline: UCB agreed to acquire Candid Therapeutics, a startup developing bispecific antibodies for autoimmune diseases, for up to $2.2 billion.
key_facts: Deal value: up to $2.2 billion; bispecific antibodies for autoimmune conditions; announced May 3, 2026

title: FDA Proposes Withdrawing Tavneos Approval
headline: The FDA published a formal proposal to withdraw approval of Amgen's Tavneos (avacopan) over alleged clinical data manipulation in its original approval submission.
key_facts: Federal Register notice 2026-08455 published April 30, 2026; Tavneos (avacopan) capsule 10 mg; approved for ANCA-associated vasculitis; FDA alleges untrue statements and data manipulation

title: Summit Therapeutics Stock Falls 27% on Trial Miss
headline: Summit Therapeutics' stock fell approximately 27% after ivonescimab, a PD-1×VEGF bispecific antibody, missed statistical significance at interim analysis of Phase 3 Harmoni-3 trial.
key_facts: Stock decline: ~27% on Thursday evening; drug: ivonescimab; trial: Phase 3 Harmoni-3; missed statistical significance at pre-planned interim analysis; plenary slot at ASCO annual meeting

title: Teva Acquires Emalex for $700M
headline: Teva Pharmaceuticals acquired Emalex Biosciences for $700 million upfront to gain ecopipam, a first-in-class D1 receptor antagonist for pediatric Tourette syndrome.
key_facts: Deal: $700 million upfront (largest Teva acquisition in decade); drug: ecopipam, first-in-class selective dopamine D1 receptor antagonist; indication: pediatric Tourette syndrome; Orphan Drug designation; NDA expected H2 2026

title: Pfizer/Arvinas PROTAC Degrader FDA Approved
headline: The FDA approved Pfizer and Arvinas' PROTAC protein degrader breast cancer drug, though data were characterized as underwhelming.
key_facts: FDA approval announced May 1, 2026; PROTAC protein degrader; breast cancer indication; first PROTAC degrader approved; companies planning third-party commercialization partner

title: Biotech IPO Boom: $3.2B Raised YTD 2026
headline: Two Boston biotechs and Avalyn Pharma raised a combined $556 million+ in upsized IPOs; 2026 YTD biotech IPOs total ~$3.2 billion across 10 companies.
key_facts: Hemab and Seaport Therapeutics combined: $556 million; Avalyn Pharma (AVLN) raised $300 million for inhaled pulmonary fibrosis therapies, IPO closed May 1; 2026 YTD: 10 companies raised ~$3.2 billion; six biotechs raised ≥$300M

title: Axsome Auvelity Wins Alzheimer's Agitation Label
headline: Axsome Therapeutics' Auvelity received FDA approval for a new indication in Alzheimer's disease agitation.
key_facts: FDA approval announced May 1, 2026; label expansion for Alzheimer's disease agitation

title: Esperion to Go Private in $1.1B Deal
headline: Esperion Therapeutics announced a take-private transaction with PE firm ArchiMed valued at approximately $1.1 billion.
key_facts: Deal value: ~$1.1 billion; acquirer: ArchiMed (PE firm); announced May 1, 2026

title: Amgen Abandons Cancer and Sjögren's Programs
headline: Amgen discontinued cancer and Sjögren's disease drug candidates following weak Phase 2 trial results.
key_facts: Weak Phase 2 data; programs in cancer and Sjögren's disease; announced May 1, 2026

title: Ligand Files Termination Notice on Viking Deal
headline: Ligand Pharmaceuticals filed a license termination notice on Viking Therapeutics' TR-Beta program, alleging contract breach of a 2014 pact.
key_facts: Termination notice filed April 30, 2026; TR-Beta program; relationship dates to 2014; alleged contract breach

title: Eli Lilly Acquires Ajax Therapeutics
headline: Eli Lilly agreed to acquire Ajax Therapeutics for up to $2.3 billion to gain AJ-1110915, a hematology candidate.
key_facts: Deal value: up to $2.3 billion; drug: AJ-1110915; indication: hematology; announced during the week

title: Chiesi Acquires KalVista for $1.9B
headline: Chiesi announced the acquisition of KalVista for $1.9 billion to gain access to rare disease drug assets.
key_facts: Deal value: $1.9 billion; rare disease focus; announced during the week

title: Samsung Biologics Labor Strike Begins
headline: Samsung Biologics' labor union began a five-day strike over wage disputes on May 1, 2026.
key_facts: Strike duration: five days; date: May 1, 2026; reason: wage disputes

title: Moderna Q1 2026: $1.34B Loss, Revenue Up 260%
headline: Moderna reported Q1 2026 loss of $1.343 billion (-$3.40/share) versus -$2.52/share prior year, with revenue of $389 million, up 260.2% YoY; company in talks with FDA on post-marketing Covid vaccine data.
key_facts: Q1 2026 loss: $1.343 billion; EPS: -$3.40/share vs. -$2.52/share prior year; revenue: $389 million, up 260.2% YoY from $108 million; in talks with FDA regarding post-marketing Covid vaccine data

title: CorMedix REZZAYO Shows Positive Phase 3 Results
headline: CorMedix reported positive Phase 3 topline results from the ReSPECT trial of REZZAYO for invasive fungal disease prophylaxis in allogeneic HSCT patients.
key_facts: Trial: Phase 3 ReSPECT; drug: REZZAYO; indication: invasive fungal disease prophylaxis in allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplant (HSCT) patients; positive topline results announced April 27, 2026

title: AstraZeneca Truqap Clears FDA Advisory Committee
headline: AstraZeneca's Truqap cleared an FDA advisory committee vote on May 1, 2026.
key_facts: FDA advisory committee vote passed May 1, 2026; drug: Truqap

title: AstraZeneca Camizestrant Advisory Committee Decision
headline: An FDA advisory committee sided against AstraZeneca's camizestrant for breast cancer.
key_facts: FDA advisory committee voted against; drug: camizestrant; indication: breast cancer

title: UniQure Seeks UK Approval
headline: UniQure plans to seek UK approval for a candidate therapy.
key_facts: UK approval being pursued; specific drug name incomplete in source material
